candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Measure the GTM floor before trusting any channel or strategy combination.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Without a clear distribution channel and growth stage, GTM motions cannot compound.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Content marketing with long-form blog, community seed launch at pre-launch stage focused on awareness.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Content-led community building before launch creates the strongest organic distribution foundation.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Product-led growth with video demos, waitlist build at early traction stage focused on activation.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Product-led growth with demo-driven waitlists converts curiosity into activation faster than content alone.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Cold outbound with case studies, public launch at scaling stage focused on revenue.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: At scaling stage, outbound powered by strong case studies converts directly to revenue faster than inbound alone.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Partnership distribution with newsletter content, beta invite strategy at early traction focused on referral.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Partnerships amplified by newsletter reach create compounding referral loops at early traction.
